note: Seed topic→table labelled set for the WP16 table finder (sub-part 1). Every expected tableId MUST exist in tests/fixtures/cbs/_catalog.json, the hermetic catalog the eval's recall runs over, so record→replay stays consistent. Several cases have a Regulier answer that ranks BELOW discontinued keyword-matches in raw recall — they test the rerank's 'prefer current tables' rule. This is a starter set; expand it during live calibration of DEFAULT_FIND_TABLE_CONFIG.highConfidence. Session-25 live calibration: 8/8 on this set. Correct confident picks measured 0.85–0.95 (floor 0.85, stable across two runs); threshold 0.8 sits 0.05 below that floor and is failure-safe (a below-0.8 pick DISCLOSES, never a wrong table). IMPORTANT GAP: this set has NO disclose-expected case yet, so the confident/disclose boundary is NOT directly measured — 0.8 is a confident-floor value, not a measured midpoint; add a genuinely-ambiguous disclose case in sub-part 2 (open-questions). zonnepanelen relabelled 82610NED→85004NED (85004NED is the specific 'zonnestroom-productie' table; 82610NED is the aggregate-renewables table — verified from the CBS Description and independently confirmed in adversarial review, not taken from the model's confidence). bevolking + woningvoorraad recall gaps fixed via alias hints (aliases.ts).

cases.note: 85004NED 'Hernieuwbare energie; zonnestroom…' is the direct solar-output table; 82610NED (general renewable electricity) is the acceptable runner-up.
